message:
Add 13 daemon lifecycle tests (start/stop/restart)

Tests verify daemon lifecycle operations:
- Start: running flag set true, start_time recorded
- Stop: running flag set false, stats preserved
- Restart: clean cycle with state reset
- Single instance: atomic compare-and-swap prevents duplicates
- Config persistence: accessible throughout lifecycle
- Shutdown: works from any state (running, mic mode, disconnected)
- Uptime: calculable from start_time
- Processing: stops correctly after shutdown signal

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
